description: finterm AI capability matrix. Drives the generated docs/how-to/capabilities.md table and runtime feature gating via CapabilityRegistry. Per-runtime values: 'supported' | 'unsupported' | 'partial' | 'planned'.

capabilities.label: Token-by-token streaming
capabilities.description: Stream response tokens to the chat surface as they arrive.

capabilities.label: MCP tool calling
capabilities.description: Agents call MCP tools (internal int__* + external <server>__*) mid-turn.

capabilities.label: MCP resources
capabilities.description: Typed read-only refs (finterm://portfolio/snapshot etc.) the agent reads without spending a tool call.

capabilities.label: MCP prompts
capabilities.description: Templated prompts surfaced in the slash menu.

capabilities.label: MCP sampling primitive
capabilities.description: Tools request an LLM completion via ctx.sample().

capabilities.label: MCP elicitation primitive
capabilities.description: Tools ask the user a structured mid-call question.

capabilities.label: SKILL.md skill loading
capabilities.description: Agents load SKILL.md methodology files into context.
capabilities.notes_local: Would require an SKILL.md → system-prompt injector on the local side; deferred.

capabilities.label: Prompt caching
capabilities.description: Long system prompts cached for input-token savings on subsequent turns.
capabilities.notes_local: Server-dependent (Ollama 0.5+ KV cache, vLLM prefix cache); finterm doesn't introspect cache hits.

capabilities.label: Persistent memory
capabilities.description: Agents store + recall durable state across turns / sessions.
capabilities.notes_local: finterm MemoryTools (memory_upsert/search/list/delete) backed by SQLite; sqlite-vec semantic search defers to Engine M1.

capabilities.label: Files API (PDF / images)
capabilities.description: Upload PDFs / images / CSVs by handle, reference across turns.
capabilities.notes_anthropic: Not exposed in claude-agent-sdk 0.2.83; revisit on SDK upgrade.
capabilities.notes_local: Not part of OpenAI-compat spec; per-server vision support varies.

capabilities.label: Per-claim citations
capabilities.description: Agent output carries source citations alongside text.

capabilities.label: Computer use (screen control)
capabilities.description: Agent controls a virtual desktop / browser.
capabilities.notes_anthropic: SDK exposes the primitive on Claude 3.5+; finterm doesn't wire the UI surface yet.

capabilities.label: Sub-agents
capabilities.description: Coordinator agent spawns child agents with their own context.
capabilities.notes_anthropic: SDK supports it; finterm's named-agent layer doesn't expose the team primitive yet.

capabilities.label: Prompt-injection guard
capabilities.description: External text wrapped with <untrusted> markers; system prompt tells the model not to follow.

capabilities.label: Per-tool kill-switch
capabilities.description: User can disable any tool system-wide; refusal wins over per-agent allowlists.

capabilities.label: Audit-grade trace log
capabilities.description: Every agent dispatch lands in agent_traces with prompts, latency, tokens, cost, status.

capabilities.label: Per-agent daily USD cap
capabilities.description: Budget gate refuses dispatch before any LLM tokens are consumed.
capabilities.notes_local: Budget enforcement works on both, but cost-attribution accuracy depends on the runtime reporting cost_usd back. Local servers usually don't.

capabilities.label: Cron-shaped scheduler
capabilities.description: @daily / @every entries fire scheduled agent runs.

capabilities.label: Slash command dispatch
capabilities.description: /comps, /dcf, /earnings, … route to named agents with resolved args.

capabilities.label: OAuth 2.0 + DCR
capabilities.description: Hosted MCP servers authenticate via OAuth. client_credentials and authorization_code grants both supported; RFC 8414 discovery, RFC 7591 dynamic client registration, RFC 7636 PKCE on authorization_code.
capabilities.notes: authorization_code flow uses a localhost callback server (default port 47823) + the user's browser; client_id must be set in SecureStorage out-of-band (DCR for browser-flow clients is rare and not auto-wired).
